---
title: "Readings & Reflections"
subtitle: "Books and papers that have shaped my thinking."
listing:
  contents: .
  sort: 
    - "rating desc"
    - "date desc"
  sort-ui: [date, rating, subtitle]
  filter-ui: [title, author, subtitle]
  type: grid 
  categories: true
  fields: [image, title, description, subtitle, author, rating]
  # Add this to force integer sorting
  field-types: 
    rating: number
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
